description: Style Notetonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a halter neckline, this black and white maxi dress has a round wooden embellishment with a fabric sash woven through to make the halter neck and a straight backMaterial and Care95% polyester and 5% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
